notes.scale: Pooled Bradley-Terry ratings over every accumulated match edge; SealBot (a fixed scripted opponent) is pinned at 0 Elo as the zero-point and its edges are down-weighted out of difference inference.
notes.candidates: cand_epN is that epoch's candidate under a fresh label, so its rating does not pool across epochs; the fixed labels (ep5, ep30, ...) do pool and tighten over time — use the latest epoch's ratings table for the compounding strength curve.
notes.pentanomial: Paired edges play mirrored openings; pentanomial is the [0, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2] points-per-pair histogram over n_pairs.

primary.hypothesis: r_candidate - r_champion (pooled BT difference, incl. Cov_LB)
